compiled_state.title: Write RED tests for post-injection placement scan (SC-5)

compiled_state.description: Extend tests/unit/scripts/test-apply-attribution-trailers.sh with: test_placement_scan_emits_no_warning_when_trailers_at_bottom() (commit msg with DSO-* only after blank line -> no warning on stderr, exit 0; verify: run apply-attribution-trailers.sh and check 2>&1 | grep -c WARNING equals 0), test_placement_scan_emits_warning_when_dso_trailer_in_message_body() (commit msg with DSO-* line in body before blank separator -> warning on stderr, exit 0). Also add test asserting blank-line separator is present immediately before first DSO-* trailer in output (SC-5 format conformance). Tests fail (RED). TDD exemption: test-writing task.
